name: Cocoa - Mocha Frosting
recipeInstructions: In a small mixing bowl, beat 1/2 cup butter or margarine until creamy. Dissolve 2 tsp instant coffee in 3 tbsp warm water. Stir together 2 1/2 cups confectioners' sugar and 1/3 cup Hershey's Premium European Style Cocoa. Add the cocoa mixture alternately with the coffee mixture to the butter, beating until smooth and creamy. (Makes about 2 cups)
